raw.subject: Something I noticed about LaBelle Spa & Nails
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed how dedicated you are to finding the right nail technicians to join your team and create a friendly work environment for both staff and clients. That's really admirable!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for locals to find you online and book appointments directly. It's a missed opportunity, as you offer a unique beauty and wellness journey tailored to each client's well-being needs.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts, highlighting your services, showcasing your work, and making it easy for people to book appointments. You can see it here:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/labelle-spa-nails-galloway

This is just a starting point, but I think it could be a straightforward project to get your website up and running, with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. If you'd like to discuss details, please reply or give me a quick call.
